Explore HVAC calculators Request your report

Independent market research for HVAC operators.

Built on Tenth studies local visibility, competitive position, phone conversion, and revenue leaks in HVAC markets. We turn those findings into clear written analysis so owners can see where calls are being lost, why competitors are winning, and what the gap is costing.

Independent research No ad spend incentive Written delivery only HVAC-focused
👤
Tanvir Hossain
Founder, Built on Tenth

After analyzing HVAC companies across local markets, their Google presence, call handling, and competitive position, the pattern became clear. The operators getting more calls were not just spending more. They were measuring differently, handling demand better, and closing the gaps everyone else ignored.

Most HVAC owners can see the spend, but not the revenue gap.

They write checks every month to agencies, ad platforms, and lead sources. In return they get reports full of clicks, impressions, and activity. What they rarely get is a clear view of booked jobs, missed calls, competitive gaps, and what those leaks are costing in revenue.

That is where bad decisions start. More spend gets recommended before the current spend is understood. More leads get bought before phone handling is fixed. And local competitors keep winning calls because nobody has mapped the market clearly enough to explain why.

"The companies losing the most money on marketing aren't being scammed. They just don't have the data to see what's happening. That's the problem we're solving."

Built on Tenth sits outside that incentive structure. We do not run ads, manage campaigns, or sell leads. Our only product is analysis, which means our only incentive is getting the analysis right.

How the research works

Every report follows the same research process so the conclusions stay consistent, specific, and tied to real HVAC market behavior.

01
Competitive market analysis

For every company we study, we map the full competitive landscape - Google Business Profile performance, review velocity, ad visibility, and organic ranking across their actual service markets. We benchmark against the top 5–7 performers in that same geography. Most owners have never seen this comparison. It's usually the first shock.

02
Revenue leak identification

We translate every gap into a dollar figure. Not "your phone answer rate is low" - but "at your call volume and average ticket, a 66% answer rate costs you an estimated $84,000/month in missed revenue." Every finding gets a number attached. No vague recommendations.

03
Pattern recognition across companies

Individual reports feed into broader benchmarks. When we have analyzed dozens of HVAC companies' phone systems, local visibility, and call handling, we can see exactly what the top quartile does differently and what it is worth in revenue. That research gets published free. That is what keeps this independent.

04
Prioritized action, not vague advice

The output is not a pile of observations. It is a ranked view of what matters most, what each gap affects, and which fixes are most likely to change booked jobs or local visibility first.

05
Written delivery, always

Every piece of work - from free tools to full reports - is delivered in writing. No calls, no presentations, no slide decks that gather dust. Documentation you can reference, share with your team, and act on at your pace.

What Built on Tenth is not.

The value of the work depends on independence. If the business model rewards more ad spend, more leads, or longer retainers, the advice is never fully neutral.

✕ Not This
A marketing agency
Agencies run your ads, manage your campaigns, and take a percentage of spend. They benefit when you spend more. The incentive structure points toward more activity, not more booked jobs.
✓ This
An independent research operation
We study what works, publish the findings, and charge only for the analysis itself. Zero incentive to recommend more spend - ever. Our reputation depends entirely on being right.
✕ Not This
A coaching or consulting program
No monthly retainers, no mastermind groups, no recurring fees. No calls where you pay to have someone tell you things you already know.
✓ This
A data-driven research service
Fixed-scope work with clear deliverables. A written report with specific findings, benchmarks, and revenue-gap analysis. You know exactly what you are getting before you pay anything.
✕ Not This
A lead marketplace
We don't sell leads, take referral fees, or have financial relationships with the vendors we mention in our research. No conflicts of interest.
✓ This
A benchmark and intelligence publisher
Free tools, free benchmarks, and published HVAC research. The goal is to raise the baseline for operators who want better decisions, not just sell to the companies who pay.

Built for HVAC operators, not marketers.

We write and work for HVAC business owners who run real operations with real trucks, real technicians, and real overhead. Not marketing departments.

🔧
Residential HVAC operators
Companies trying to improve booked jobs, close more replacement opportunities, and understand where local visibility or phone handling is leaking revenue.
📍
Local market leaders in the making
Teams that want to know who is outranking them in Google Maps, why competitors are getting the calls, and what changes are most likely to close that gap.
📞
Owners who want numbers, not pitches
Operators spending on ads, agencies, or lead sources who want written analysis, clear benchmarks, and a better view of what the gaps are costing right now.
